ddls:
CREATE TABLE "object_poses" (
  "pose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pose estimation */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the pose estimation */,
  "norm_posX" REAL /* Normalized X position of the object */,
  "norm_posY" REAL /* Normalized Y position of the object */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the pose estimation */,
  "theta" REAL /* Euler angle theta representing the object's orientation */,
  "phi" REAL /* Euler angle phi representing the object's orientation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "pose_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the pose estimation */,
  "pose_source" TEXT /* Source of the pose data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_poses_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_poses_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_poses_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "object_size" TEXT /* Size of the object */,
  "object_color" TEXT /* Color of the object */,
  "object_material" TEXT /* Material of the object */,
  "object_weight" REAL /* Weight of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset (number of pose estimations) */,
  "dataset_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_pose_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "pose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pose estimation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_pose_links_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_pose_links_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_pose_links_pose_id FOREIGN KEY ("pose_id") REFERENCES object_poses ("pose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_pose_links_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pose_estimation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the pose estimation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method (e.g., neural network, traditional algorithm) */,
  "method_accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy of the method */,
  "method_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the method (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pose_estimation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "pose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pose estimation */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pose estimation method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the pose estimation */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method used */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pose_estimation_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES pose_estimation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pose estimation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pose estimation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pose estimation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pose_id FOREIGN KEY ("pose_id") REFERENCES object_poses ("pose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES object_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_category_links_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "env_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "pose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pose estimation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the environment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the environment */,
  "lighting" REAL /* Lighting of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Additional conditions of the environment (e.g., weather, noise level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_pose_id FOREIGN KEY ("pose_id") REFERENCES object_poses ("pose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, LIDAR) */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Additional conditions of the environment (e.g., weather, noise level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
